advancement.fairplay.root.title: Fair Minecraft
advancement.fairplay.root.description: Only what you build yourself truly belongs to you.
advancement.fairplay.trespassing.title: Trespassing
advancement.fairplay.trespassing.descrip: You cannot break blocks you did not place yourself.
advancement.fairplay.own_hands.title: Your Own Hands
advancement.fairplay.own_hands.descripti: What you build is yours. And yours alone.
advancement.fairplay.endless_stone.title: Endless Stone
advancement.fairplay.endless_stone.descr: Lava + water = infinite cobblestone. And it is yours.
advancement.fairplay.collector.title: Collector
advancement.fairplay.collector.descripti: The first item lands in your hands.
advancement.fairplay.foundation.title: Foundation
advancement.fairplay.foundation.descript: Your first block. Something great begins here.
advancement.fairplay.chef.title: Chef
advancement.fairplay.chef.description: With fire and patience you process your resources.
advancement.fairplay.endless_iron.title: Endless Iron?
advancement.fairplay.endless_iron.descri: An iron golem has fallen and left iron behind.
advancement.fairplay.empty_hands.title: Empty Hands
advancement.fairplay.empty_hands.descrip: The chest was empty. Nothing to steal here.
advancement.fairplay.diy.title: DIY
advancement.fairplay.diy.description: Your first crafted item. The beginning of everything.
advancement.fairplay.green_thumb.title: Green Thumb
advancement.fairplay.green_thumb.descrip: A sapling – the beginning of your forest.
advancement.fairplay.my_forest.title: My Forest
advancement.fairplay.my_forest.descripti: Your sapling became a whole tree. It belongs to you.
advancement.fairplay.sowing.title: Sowing
advancement.fairplay.sowing.description: The soil is ready. Your own food is growing.
advancement.fairplay.harvest.title: Harvest
advancement.fairplay.dripstone_trick.des: Your dripstone collects what the earth provides.
advancement.fairplay.water_management.de: Your own water source – fresh and rightfully yours.
advancement.fairplay.infinite.title: Infinite
advancement.fairplay.hot_lava.title: Hot Lava
advancement.fairplay.hot_lava.descriptio: Lava – the liquid gold of the underworld.
advancement.fairplay.no_violence.title: No Violence
advancement.fairplay.no_violence.descrip: Direct attacks are forbidden. Be creative.
advancement.fairplay.resourcefulness.des: Sometimes the long way around is the better path.
advancement.fairplay.mans_best_friend.de: A loyal companion for all time.
advancement.fairplay.bodyguard.title: Bodyguard
advancement.fairplay.bodyguard.descripti: Your dog handles what you are not allowed to do yourself.
advancement.fairplay.own_fleet.title: Own Fleet
advancement.fairplay.own_fleet.descripti: By water or on rails – you travel in style.
advancement.fairplay.good_night.title: Good Night
advancement.fairplay.good_night.descript: Sleeping is easy. Bringing your own bed is not.
advancement.fairplay.bed_to_go.title: Bed To Go
advancement.fairplay.bed_to_go.descripti: Now you sleep safely wherever you are.
advancement.fairplay.fair_trade.title: Fair Trade
advancement.fairplay.fair_trade.descript: Barter and trade – the honest path to progress.
advancement.fairplay.ignition.title: Ignition
advancement.fairplay.ignition.descriptio: Let a Creeper explode to clear blocks.
advancement.fairplay.first_night.title: First Night
advancement.fairplay.first_night.descrip: You survived your first night. The world is yours to conquer.
